greeting: ^Commander Voss: You... you are living. I have not seen the living in a long time.
^Commander Voss: I am Voss. Or what remains of him. I commanded this outpost before the shadow came.
^Commander Voss: Listen carefully. Beneath this ruin lies the Shattered Sanctum. Three seals hold a being of pure void — the Hollow King.
^Commander Voss: The seals are breaking. If they fail, he walks free. You must reach the Sanctum and reinforce them with the three Seal Fragments.
^Commander Voss: My soldiers... they fell trying. Their patrol markers are still out there. If you find them, bring them to me.
^Commander Voss: The first Fragment should be in my old armory — the eastern section. The others lie deeper.
reminder: ^Commander Voss: The seals will not hold forever. Find the three Seal Fragments and descend.
^Commander Voss: My soldiers' patrol markers — three of them, scattered through this floor. Bring them to me if you find them.
patrol_thanks: ^Commander Voss: You found them. All three markers.
^Commander Voss: Sergeant Oram. Private Hess. Young Calder. They were good soldiers.
^Commander Voss: Take this — the armory key. I no longer need it. And... thank you.
^Commander Voss: Do not let their deaths be for nothing. Seal the Hollow King back in his prison.
